Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All basic metabolic, renal, and glycemic parameters are within normal limits. Lipid profile shows elevated LDL cholesterol and low HDL cholesterol, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Microalbumin/creatinine ratio is normal, suggesting no significant renal impairment. Recommend addressing dyslipidemia and monitoring cardiovascular risk factors.
